General.Name: Zhonggan Commun (Grp) Hldg Ltd
General.Description: Zhonggan Communication (Group) Holdings Limited provides telecommunications infrastructure services and digitalization solution services the People's Republic of China. The company offers infrastructure construction services, which includes the construction, adaptation, and installation works of network infrastructure; telecommunications network services, including base stations and auxiliary facilities engineering services, power grid connection services, cable installation services, access network related services, and wireless network equipment installation services. It also provides infrastructure maintenance services, which involves carrying out routine basic maintenance, repairs, and restoration works, as well as emergency trouble shooting to the telecommunications infrastructure. In addition, the company offers infrastructure digitalization solution services, which includes integrated solution services, such as system design planning; supply of hardware and software, as well as installation and integration services; and after-sale services. Further, it provides technical support and maintenance services for the hardware and software systems comprising day-to-day system, network maintenance, and data back-up support services; consulting services; system migration solution services; and emergency trouble shooting services. Additionally, the company offers software solution services that focuses on the sale of self-developed software and delivers customized software development services; and infrastructure digitalization solution services. It serves telecommunications network operators, telecommunications tower infrastructure service providers, local governments, quasi-government institutions, and state-owned enterprises. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Nanchang, China. Zhonggan Communication (Group) Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of GT & Yangtze Limited.
